name: Nazeebo
description: A sustained damage Mage who gains power when killing enemy minions.
title: Heretic Witch Doctor
info: With cabalistic incantations and vestments of feather and bone, the witch doctor Nazeebo calls upon spirits from the Unformed Land to aid him. Few outlanders encounter a witch doctor in the flesh, without losing their own.

Nazeebo.name: Corpse Spiders
Nazeebo.description: Hurl a jar of spiders that deals 50 (+4% per level) damage. If it hits at least one enemy, create 3 Corpse Spiders that attack for 38 (+4% per level) damage. Spiders last for 4 seconds.

Nazeebo.name: Zombie Wall
Nazeebo.description: After 1 second, create a ring of Zombies surrounding the target area that deal 28 (+4% per level) damage and last for 3 seconds.

Nazeebo.name: Plague of Toads
Nazeebo.description: Create a wave of 3 Toads that explode on contact, dealing 126 (+4% per level) damage over 6 seconds. This effect stacks.  Stores up to 2 charges.

Nazeebo.name: Gargantuan
Nazeebo.description: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area, losing Health over 29 seconds. Deals 100 (+4% per level) damage when summoned, attacks for 140 (+4% per level) damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals 240 (+4% per level) damage and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.

Nazeebo.name: Ravenous Spirit
Nazeebo.description: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals 230 (+4% per level) damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for 8 seconds.

Nazeebo.name: Voodoo Ritual
Nazeebo.description: Nazeebo's Basic Attacks and Abilities poison Non-Heroic enemies, causing them to take 67 (+4% per level) additional damage over 6 seconds.  Quest: If a Minion dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, Nazeebo permanently gains 6 Health and 1 Mana.

WitchDoctorGargantuan.name: Gargantuan Stomp
WitchDoctorGargantuan.description: Order the Gargantuan to stomp, dealing 240 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by 30% for 2 seconds.

1.name: Widowmakers
1.description: Enemies hit by Corpse Spiders' jar are Slowed by 25% for 1 second.  Reward: After Corpse Spiders attack Heroes 100 times, their attack damage is increased by 25% and their duration is increased by 1 second.

1.name: Pandemic
1.description: Quest: Hit Heroes with Plague of Toads.  Reward: After hitting 35 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it spawns 2 additional toads.  Reward: After hitting 70 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it reduces the damage Heroes deal by 5%, stacking up to 25%.

1.name: Thing of the Deep
1.description: Increase the range of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 20%.  Reward: After gaining 50 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain 5% Spell Power.  Reward: After gaining 100 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain an additional 5% Spell Power.

4.name: Hexed Crawlers
4.description: Corpse Spiders restore 1% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana when they attack an enemy Hero.

4.name: Big Voodoo
4.description: Increases the Health and Mana bonuses from Voodoo Ritual by 100%.

4.name: Blood Ritual
4.description: If an enemy dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, restore 2% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana.  Passive: Takedowns grant 3 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.

7.name: Spirit of Arachyr
7.description: The number of Corpse Spiders spawned is increased from 3 to 4. If Corpse Spiders' jar hits only one enemy, it creates an additional spider.

7.name: Dead Rush
7.description: Zombie Wall deals 100% more damage. When it expires up to 5 remaining Zombies uproot and attack nearby enemies, losing Health over 3 seconds.

7.name: Toads of Hugeness
7.description: Increase the damage and explosion radius of Plague of Toads by 25% after each hop, up to a maximum of 100%.

10.name: Gargantuan
10.description: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area, losing Health over 29 seconds. Deals 100 (+4% per level) damage when summoned, attacks for 140 (+4% per level) damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals 240 (+4% per level) damage and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.

10.name: Ravenous Spirit
10.description: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals 230 (+4% per level) damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for 8 seconds.

13.name: Guardian Toads
13.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plague of Toads grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, stacking up to 6 seconds.

13.name: Superstition
13.description: Gain 40 Spell Armor. Heroic Basic Attacks against Nazeebo remove this bonus for 3 seconds and spawn a Corpse Spider to attack the Hero.

13.name: Ice Block
13.description: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds.

16.name: Spider Colony
16.description: Corpse Spider Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 0.125 seconds.

16.name: Ring of Poison
16.description: Zombie Wall lasts 1 second longer, and the center is filled with poison that deals a total of 319 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. This damage starts small and increases over the duration.

16.name: Soul Harvest
16.description: Activate to increase Nazeebo's Health and Spell Power by 7% for each nearby enemy, up to a maximum of 35%. Lasts 15 seconds.

20.name: Humongoid
20.description: Gargantuan Stomp's area is increased by 25% and its Slow amount is increased to 50%.  Passive: Reduce Gargantuan's cooldown by 40 seconds and its Mana cost by 50%.

20.name: Annihilating Spirit
20.description: When Ravenous Spirit damages an enemy Hero, reduce their healing received by 50% for 1 second and increase Ravenous Spirit's damage by 5% for the rest of its duration.  Passive: Increases the range of Ravenous Spirit by 50%.

20.name: Vile Infection
20.description: Quest: Reach 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.  Reward: After reaching 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, it can also be applied to Heroes and its damage is increased from 67 (+4% per level) to 167 (+4% per level) over 6 seconds.

20.name: Bad Medicine
20.description: Consume 5 stacks of Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable, gain 20% increased Movement Speed, and 50 Armor for 2 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.GenericIceBlockTalent: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,TalentBucketIceBlock,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorBadMedicine: Consume <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,WitchDoctorBadMedicineModifyTokenCount,Value"/></c> stacks of Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,WitchDoctorBadMedicineSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> increased Movement Speed, and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorBadMedicineArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorBadMedicineSpeedBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorBigVoodoo: Increases the Health and Mana bonuses from Voodoo Ritual by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,WitchDoctorBigVoodooHealthAccumulator,Scale/Accumulator,WitchDoctorVoodooRitualHealthAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorCorpseSpiders: Hurl a jar of spiders that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorCorpseSpidersJarDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. If it hits at least one enemy, create <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NazeeboCorpseSpidersSpawnSpiderSearch,MaxCount" player="0"/> </c>Corpse Spiders that attack for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorCorpseSpidersWeaponDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Spiders last for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorCorpseSpidersTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorGargantuan: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area, losing Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Unit,WitchDoctorGargantuan,LifeMax/Unit,WitchDoctorGargantuan,LifeRegenRate"/></c> seconds. Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorGargantuanInitialImpactDamage,Amount"/></c> damage when summoned, attacks for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorGargantuanDamage,Amount"/></c> damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorGargantuanStompDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slows by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,WitchDoctorGargantuanStompSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor" player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorGargantuanStompSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorGargantuanHumongoidTalent: Gargantuan Stomp's area is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,WitchDoctorHumongoid,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[3].Value"/>%</c> and its Slow amount is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*(Behavior,WitchDoctorGargantuanStompSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor+Talent,WitchDoctorHumongoid,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[5].Value)" player="0"/>%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Reduce Gargantuan's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,WitchDoctorHumongoid,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds and its Mana cost by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorGargantuanStomp: Order the Gargantuan to stomp, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorGargantuanStompDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100 * Behavior,WitchDoctorGargantuanStompSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"player="0"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorGargantuanStompSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorGuardianToads: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plague of Toads grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorPlagueofToadsGuardianToadsArmorIncrease,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorPlagueofToadsGuardianToadsTalentApplyResistant,Duration"precision="1"/></c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorPlagueofToadsGuardianToadsTalentSetMaxBuffDuration,Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorHexedCrawlers: Corpse Spiders restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,WitchDoctorCorpseSpidersHexedCrawlersTalentModifyMana,RechargeVitalFraction"precision="2"/>%</c> of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana when they attack an enemy Hero.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorPandemic: Quest: Hit Heroes with Plague of Toads.Reward: After hitting Heroes with Plague of Toads, it spawns 2 additional toads.Reward: After hitting Heroes with Plague of Toads, it reduces the damage Heroes deal by %, stacking up to %.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorPlagueOfToads: Create a wave of <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Toads that explode on contact, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorPlagueofToadsDamage,Amount*(1+Behavior,WitchDoctorPlagueofToadsDoT,Duration)"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorPlagueofToadsDoT,Duration"player="0"/></c> seconds. This effect stacks.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,WitchDoctorPlagueofToads,Cost.Charge.CountMax"/></c> charges.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorPlagueOfToadsToadsOfHugenessT: Increase the damage and explosion radius of Plague of Toads by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorPlagueofToadsToadsOfHugenessTalentDamage1,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier*100"/>%</c> after each hop, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorPlagueofToadsToadsOfHugenessTalentDamage1,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier*Behavior,WitchDoctorPlagueofToadsSizeStack,MaxStackCount*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorRavenousSpirit: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorRavenousSpiritDamage,Amount*2"/></c> damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorRavenousSpiritUnitBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorRavenousSpiritAnnihilatingSpi: When Ravenous Spirit damages an enemy Hero, reduce their healing received by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,WitchDoctorRavenousSpiritAnnihilatingSpiritTalentHealingReduction,Modification.HealTakenAdditiveMultiplier[Life]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorRavenousSpiritAnnihilatingSpiritTalentHealingReduction,Duration"/></c> second and increase Ravenous Spirit's damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,RavenousSpiritAnnihilatingSpiritDamageAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c> for the rest of its duration.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increases the range of Ravenous Spirit by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Talent,WitchDoctorAnnihilatingSpirits,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,WitchDoctorRavenousSpirit,Range)*100" player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorRingOfPoison: Zombie Wall lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,WitchDoctorRingOfPoison,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> second longer, and the center is filled with poison that deals a total of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorZombieWallPoisonZombieTalentDamage1,Amount+Effect,WitchDoctorZombieWallPoisonZombieTalentDamage2,Amount+Effect,WitchDoctorZombieWallPoisonZombieTalentDamage3,Amount+Effect,WitchDoctorZombieWallPoisonZombieTalentDamage4,Amount+Effect,WitchDoctorZombieWallPoisonZombieTalentDamage5,Amount"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. This damage starts small and increases over the duration.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorSoulHarvest: Activate to increase Nazeebo's Health and Spell Power by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorSoulHarvestModifyPlayer,EffectArray[0].Value*100"/>%</c> for each nearby enemy, up to a maximum of <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorSoulHarvestModifyPlayer,EffectArray[0].Value*100*Behavior,WitchDoctorSoulHarvestStack,MaxStackCount"/>%</c>. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorSoulHarvestStack,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorSpiderColony: Corpse Spider Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,WitchDoctorCorpseSpidersSpiderColonyTalentModifyCooldown,Cost[2].CooldownTimeUse" precision="3"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorSpiritofArachyr: The number of Corpse Spiders spawned is increased from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NazeeboCorpseSpidersSpawnSpiderSearch,MaxCount"player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,NazeeboCorpseSpidersSpawnSpiderSearch,MaxCount+Talent,WitchDoctorSpiritofArachyr,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"player="0"/></c>. If Corpse Spiders' jar hits only one enemy, it creates an additional spider.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorSuperstition: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorSuperstitionAbilityDamageCarry,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor. Heroic Basic Attacks against Nazeebo remove this bonus for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorSuperstitionSpellArmorSuppression,Duration"/></c> seconds and spawn a Corpse Spider to attack the Hero.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorThingOfTheDeepTalent: Increase the range of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by %.Reward: After gaining stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain % Spell Power.Reward: After gaining stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain an additional % Spell Power.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorVileInfection: Quest: Reach stacks of Voodoo Ritual.Reward: After reaching stacks of Voodoo Ritual, it can also be applied to Heroes and its damage is increased from to over seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorVoodooRitualBloodRitualTalent: If an enemy dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,WitchDoctorVoodooRitualBloodRitualTalentCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction"/>%</c> of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Takedowns grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorVoodooRitualBloodRitualTalentTakedownProcPersistent,PeriodCount"/></c> stacks of Voodoo Ritual.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorVoodooRitualTrait: Nazeebo's Basic Attacks and Abilities poison Non-Heroic enemies, causing them to take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorVoodooRitualDoT,Duration*Effect,WitchDoctorVoodooRitualDamage,Amount"/></c> additional damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorVoodooRitualDoT,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. <n/><n/><c val="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> If a Minion dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, Nazeebo permanently gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,WitchDoctorVoodooRitualHealthAccumulator,Scale"/></c> Health and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,WitchDoctorVoodooRitualEnergyAccumulator,Scale"/></c> Mana.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorWidowmakers: Enemies hit by Corpse Spiders' jar are Slowed by % for second.Reward: After Corpse Spiders attack Heroes times, their attack damage is increased by % and their duration is increased by second.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorZombieWall: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, create a ring of Zombies surrounding the target area that deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorZombieWallWeaponDamage,Amount"/> </c>damage and last for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,WitchDoctorZombieWallTimedLife,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.WitchDoctorZombieWallDeadRushTalent: Zombie Wall deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,WitchDoctorZombieWallWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[DeadRush].Modifier*100"/>%</c> more damage. When it expires up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> remaining Zombies uproot and attack nearby enemies, losing Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Unit,WitchDoctorZombieWallDeadRushTalentUnit,LifeMax/Unit,WitchDoctorZombieWallDeadRushTalentUnit,LifeRegenRate" player="0"/></c> seconds.
